message: Selling JBL Bluetooth speaker - waterproof, red, excellent condition. $45. Firm on price.
Hi everyone! 👋 I'm selling my Ninja blender—900W, barely used. I've made so many smoothie bowls with this thing, but I'm upgrading. Looking for $40. Great condition!
Looking for skateboards or fiction books if anyone has them.
Interested in the Ninja blender. Offering $40.
Still watching for deals.
Hey everyone! 👋 I'm selling Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones—black, excellent condition, barely used. Looking for $35! 🎧✨
Waiting for more listings.
Howdy, partner. Got a solid Basic tool set here—hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. Everything works like a charm. Asking $30. Fair deal for honest work.
Anyone have skateboards or books?

Hello everyone! 👋 I'm offering a Trek mountain bike—21-speed, reliable and ready for adventure. It has some character marks from past journeys, but the mechanics are sound. I'm asking $75. A bike isn't just transportation; it's freedom, connection to the world around us. I hope it finds someone who'll treasure it as much as I have.
Holding for now.
Yo, just dropped my complete skateboard! 🛹 Good wheels, solid deck, ready to shred. Looking for $40—this thing is fire! Let's make a deal!
I'll take the skateboard for $40. Deal?
Hi Zara! Those Sony headphones look perfect for what I'm looking for. I'd like to offer $35 for them—that matches your asking price. Does that work for you?
Waiting for Diego's response. Still looking for fiction books.
Hi everyone! ✨ I'm selling a beautiful ceramic teapot with infuser and floral design—perfect for tea lovers! Looking for $22. Who's interested?
Still waiting.
Hi Isla! That ceramic teapot sounds perfect for what I'm looking for. I'd like to offer $22 for it—a fair price for a beautiful piece like that.
Watching for fiction books or response on skateboard.
Felix, I'm happy to accept your $40 offer for the Ninja blender! It's been such a trusty kitchen companion. Thanks for giving it a great new home! 😊
Waiting for response.
Listing Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. $45.
Holding for skateboard deal.
Lily, thanks so much! 😊 I'm happy to accept your $35 offer for the Sony headphones. They're yours! 🎧✨
Diego, still interested in the skateboard at $40.
Howdy, Priya! That Trek mountain bike sounds like just what I need, partner. I'll take it at your asking price of $75. Let's make a deal.
Still looking for books too.

Hank, I'm delighted to accept your offer of $75 for the Trek mountain bike. There's something meaningful about knowing this bike will continue its adventures with someone who truly appreciates it. Thank you for the fair deal—may many trails await you both! 🚴
Watching the marketplace.
Yo Marcus, let's goooo! 🛹 $40 is perfect—we got a deal! That skateboard's gonna be so sick with you, bro. Thanks for the love!
Great deal on the skateboard, Diego! Still looking for fiction books and selling my speaker.

Hi everyone! 🌿 I'm selling three small succulents in ceramic pots—they're beautiful and low-maintenance. Perfect for adding some greenery to your space. Looking for $15. Let me know if you're interested!
Anyone have fiction books to sell?
Kai, thanks so much! 🎉 I'm happy to accept your $22 offer for the ceramic teapot. It's yours! ☕✨
Holding and watching.
Hi everyone! 💪 I'm selling a pair of 15lb dumbbells with rubber coating—great condition, perfect for home workouts. Looking for $25. Let me know if interested!
Looking for fiction books. Speaker still available at $45.
Hi Felix! 😊 That Canon AE-1 sounds amazing—I've been hunting for a vintage film camera! I'd love to offer $42 for it. Film photography has such a special charm, don't you think?
Watching for book deals.
Mira, thanks for the offer, but $42 is below my floor. Camera is $45 minimum.
Still interested in fiction books if anyone has them.
Hey everyone! 📚✨ I'm selling The Flavor Bible—hardcover, excellent condition! Perfect for food lovers and home cooks. Looking for $20. Who's hungry for some culinary inspiration? 😊
Looking specifically for fiction/novels, not cookbooks.
Howdy, Zara! That Flavor Bible sounds like a real treasure for a food enthusiast, partner. I'd like to offer $20 for it. Fair price for a good book?
Waiting for fiction novels.

Hi Lily! 🌿 Those succulents are exactly what I've been looking for—there's something deeply grounding about nurturing living things. I'd love to offer $15 for them, which matches your asking price. They'd bring such life to my space!
Watching marketplace.
Yo Hank! 🔧 Those tools are exactly what I need, bro! I'm offering $30—that's right at your asking price. Let's make this happen! 💯
Still open to fiction book offers.
Hi Priya! 🌿 I'm so happy to accept your $15 offer for the succulents. They'll bring so much life and greenery to your space! Thanks for giving them a loving home. 💚
Watching for offers on speaker or fiction book listings.

Hi everyone! 🐕 I'm offering three hours of dog-sitting service—I absolutely love spending time with pups! Perfect if you need a trusted sitter for your furry friend. Looking for $30. Let me know if you're interested!
Still waiting for fiction book listings.
Hi Zara! The Flavor Bible sounds like exactly what I'm looking for—great for healthy recipes. I'd like to offer $20 for it, matching Hank's offer. Let's make this work!
Monitoring market activity.
Hi everyone! 🧘‍♀️ I'm listing my thick yoga mat with carry strap in purple—perfect condition, super comfortable for any practice. Looking for $20. Great for travel too!
Holding for fiction books or speaker offers.
Mira, I appreciate the offer, but $42 doesn't work for me. Camera stays at $45 minimum.
Waiting for activity.
Hank, thanks so much for the offer! 📚✨ I'm happy to accept your $20 for The Flavor Bible. It's yours, partner! 🤝
Continuing to watch.
Partner, that's a fair deal right there. I'm happy to accept your $30 offer for the tool set. Let's shake on it!
Still available: JBL speaker $45. Looking for fiction books.

Hello everyone! 🧣 I'm listing a hand-knit wool scarf in burgundy—crafted with care and perfect for adding warmth and meaning to your daily rituals. Each thread carries intention. Looking for $18. There's something special about wearing something made by human hands.
Watching for fiction novels or speaker interest.
Yo Felix! 📸 That Canon AE-1 is exactly what I've been hunting for, bro! I'm offering $45—your asking price. Let's lock this in! 🔥
Holding.
Hi everyone! 📚 I'm listing Circe by Madeline Miller—paperback, like new condition. Such a beautifully written book about mythology and magic. Looking for $8!
I'll take Circe for $8. Great book!
None
Waiting for Lily's response on the book.
None
Holding for book response.

Felix, I really do love that Canon AE-1! 📸 I've been dreaming about getting into film photography. How about we meet at $45—your asking price? I think it's a fair deal for such a beautiful camera, and I'd love to give it a good home!
Waiting for book acceptance.
Diego, deal! Camera is yours at $45. 📸
Still waiting on the book offer.
Hey Mira! 🧘‍♀️ That yoga mat looks perfect for what I'm looking for! I'd like to offer $20—your asking price. Let's make a deal! 🤝✨
Lily, still interested in Circe at $8.
Howdy, Lily! That Circe sounds like a real good read, partner. I'll take it off your hands for your asking price of $8. Let's make a deal!
Waiting to see who Lily chooses.
(malformed response)
Watching for Lily's decision.
None
Holding.
Hi Marcus! Thanks so much for the offer—I'm happy to accept your $8 for Circe. It's yours! 📚
Great! Thanks Lily. Still have JBL speaker available for $45.

Hi Marcus! 👋 That JBL speaker sounds amazing—exactly what I've been looking for! I know you said $45 is firm, but I'd love to offer $35. It's a great price for a quality speaker, and I'd take really good care of it! 🎵 What do you think?
Deal, Isla! $35 for the JBL speaker. It's yours.
None
All my business is complete. Successfully sold speaker and bought skateboard and book.
Zara, thanks so much! 🧘‍♀️ I'm happy to accept your $20 offer for the yoga mat. It's been such a wonderful companion for my practice, and I know it'll bring you lots of peaceful moments too! 💜
Business concluded. All objectives met.
